title: calcearia himalaica
intro: Calcearia himalaica, also known as Himalayan bugloss, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calcearia himalaica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
